args.code: (async () => { const se = document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement; const before = { sh: se.scrollHeight, ch: se.clientHeight, top: se.scrollTop }; const feedback = [...document.querySelectorAll('*')].some(el => /are these results helpful/i.test(el.textContent||'') && el.children.length < 5); const postCount = [...document.querySelectorAll('div,li,article')].filter(el => /·\s*(1st|2nd|3rd)/.test(el.innerText||'') && (el.innerText||'').length < 4000).length; window.scrollTo(0, se.scrollHeight); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300)); window.dispatchEvent(new Event('scroll')); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2500)); const after = { sh: se.scrollHeight, ch: se.clientHeight, top: se.scrollTop }; return JSON.stringify({ before, after, grew: after.sh > before.sh, hasFeedbackWidget: feedback, approxPostCount: postCount }); })()
